column1: # Fixed HSP algorithms and optimized URS assumptions for 103 functions
# Optimization was done with regards to metric 'balanced_accuracy', based on 20 cross-validations
# Other listed parameters such as cv_test_pool, hsp_min_likelihood_for_presence & hsp_max_likelihood_for_absence have not been optimized, and simply specify the values used during cross validation.
# Listed metrics other than 'balanced_accuracy' are not optimized, and simply refer to the score achieved in that metric.

# Used command: dependencies/faprotax.R -d dependencies/faprotax --mode optimize --omit_functions photosynthetic_cyanobacteria --NCV 20 --unknown_ref_states omit,absent --cv_test_pool config -c dependencies/faprotax/default_config.tsv --out_cv dependencies/faprotax/optimization_results -v --include_summary_comments
